description_long: This is a rectangular slice of chocolate cake with two visible layers of dark chocolate sponge separated by a thick, creamy white filling. The top surface is coated with a glossy chocolate ganache, adorned with a generous swirl of white whipped cream piped at one end. The cake's sides reveal a moist, slightly textured crumb, and the filling appears smooth and evenly distributed. Fine diagonal lines are etched into the ganache, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall appearance is neat and appetizing, with a minimalist yet elegant presentation. No additional decorations or embellishments are present.
description: A rectangular chocolate cake slice with two sponge layers, white cream filling, glossy ganache top, and a piped whipped cream swirl.
description_view_0: Front view shows the piped whipped cream swirl centered on the glossy ganache top, with visible chocolate and cream layers.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the cake, the thick cream filling, and the swirl of whipped cream at one end.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the whipped cream swirl and the even layering of cake and filling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the cake's length and the piped cream swirl positioned at the far end.
